name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the plugin
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**

What are you trying to do that the plugin makes hard today?

**Proposed solution**

What you'd like to see. Note: the public contract (REST routes,
`facevault_*` hooks and filters, `_facevault_*` user-meta keys, the
`[facevault_verify]` shortcode) is stable — additive changes are much easier
to accept than breaking ones. The plugin also deliberately exposes only the
verification decision, never raw scores.

**Alternatives considered**

Other approaches you looked at, including other plugins or custom code.
